    Struct Vector4F

    Vector with 4 float parameters

    [ComVisible(false)]
public struct Vector4F : IEquatable<Vector4F>

    Methods

    Name Description
    Equals(Vector4F)

    Returns a boolean indicating whether the given Vector4F is equal to this Vector4F instance.
    Equals(object)

    Returns a boolean indicating whether the given Object is equal to this Vector4F instance.
    GetHashCode()

    Returns the hash code for this instance.
    Normalized()

    Creates normilized vector.
    SafeNormalized()

    Creates normilized vector safely(returns self if length is zero).
    ToVector2F()

    Creates Vector2F.
    ToVector3F()

    Creates Vector3F.
    Zero()

    Creates vector with (0, 0, 0).

    Operators

    Name Description
    operator +(Vector4F, Vector4F)

    Adds two vectors together.
    operator /(Vector4F, float)

    Divides vector by scalar value.
    operator ==(Vector4F, Vector4F)

    Returns a boolean indicating whether the two given vectors are equal.
    operator !=(Vector4F, Vector4F)

    Returns a boolean indicating whether the two given vectors are not equal.
    operator *(Vector4F, float)

    Multiplies vector by scalar value.
    operator -(Vector4F, Vector4F)

    Subtracts the second vector from the first.
